title.en: In this way, seventeen realm years passed.

content.en:
Ye Tian chose to take the hegemony ancestral technique among the ancestral techniques as the research and deduction object, and strive to deduce the ultimate ancestral technique of hegemony.

After all, he had already succeeded in creating an Ultimate Ancestral Technique, and he was considered to have gained experience, so although it was still difficult to continue to study the second Ancestral Technique, he could at least save a little time.

As a result, in the next realm years, Ye Tian spent most of his time creating the Ultimate Hegemony Ancestral Technique.

As for the affairs of the human race, he almost didn't care, and almost let the temple manage the unsurpassed soul ancestors and the unsurpassed domain ancestors.

In this way, seventeen realm years passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally created the Ultimate Ancestral Technique, and his strength soared.

Then, Ye Tian spent more than a dozen realm years to create a speed-type Ultimate Ancestral Technique-Streamer Ultimate Ancestral Technique!

Defense, speed, and strength, these three ultimate ancestral skills have all been created, and it can be said that Ye Tian's strength has skyrocketed a lot, and there are no flaws.

Coupled with the continuous refining of a large number of Silent Treasures in dozens of realm years, the cultivation has risen dramatically.

Therefore, Ye Tian's current strength has reached an extremely powerful Elite Domain Ancestor combat power, which is a kind of perception and understanding as an ancestor, and there is no need to test the combat power.

If he used the power of the Dark Soul Domain, Ye Tian would definitely not be afraid of the Holy Ancestor and the Ancestor of Destruction.

"Finally, you don't have to worry about destroying the two ancestors, the Ancestor and the Holy Ancestor! There are still dozens of realm years left, and it is more difficult to improve the strength of the doppelganger Aoba Ancestor, it is estimated that it will not be able to be promoted to the top Ancestor level, so let's mainly comprehend the Creation Ancestor Method!"

Ye Tian decided.

Dozens of realm years, Ye Tian's ontology of the Ancestor Law has still not been created, if he only created the general Ancestor Law, he would have created it a long time ago, but the Ancestor Law he wants to create is the Endless Ancestor Law, including all the Ancestor Dao.

But he obviously has a great understanding, and even groped for the doorway, but he is still only one step away, and he has never been able to create it completely.

Another realm year had passed, and Ye Tian's progress had stagnated.

"No, there has been no progress in such a long time, even if it is only one step away, it must be a misunderstanding of the wrong direction!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The Endless Ancestor Law cannot really contain all the Ancestral Laws, and the Ancestral Law is theoretically endless, so it is necessary to continuously evolve many Ancestral Laws based on the Basic Ancestor Law, and finally form the Endless Ancestor Law.

However, it is too difficult to create the Endless Ancestor Method at one time, so you can create a basic Ancestor Method in advance, and then fuse many Ancestor Methods, so as to completely create the Endless Ancestor Method.

Moreover, the creation of a door foundation ancestor method can also allow some of the human race's non-superior peak domain ancestors or soul ancestors to fuse with the ancestor method, thus becoming a famous ancestor.

In this way, the Terrans will give birth to a large number of ancestors!

However, even if there is an Ancestral Method that no one cultivates, it is more difficult to fuse, so it may not be suitable, and it will take endless and long years.

And others are not as able to use derivation as many times as he is, shattering and copying their bodies again and again, and others shattering their bodies once and falling.

Therefore, his path cannot be replicated by others.

However, with the complete Ancestral Dharma, this is an opportunity to become an Ancestor one day.

"Let's start with the Golden Ancestor Law!"

Ye Tian decided.

His understanding of the Ancestral Law was incomparably profound, even surpassing those Ancestors.

Many ancestors obtained the Ancestor Method by accident, and after merging, they became the Ancestor Law, and some of them created the Ancestor Law by themselves, but it is also a relatively general Ancestor Law.

The most awesome is the space-time ancestor, the other party created the space-time ancestor method, so the potential is very high, but the cultivation time is short, so there is no way to surpass the destruction ancestor.

However, if the Ancestor of Time and Space was given endless years of cultivation, he would really surpass the Ancestor of Destruction and become the First Ancestor of the Destruction Saint Ancestor.

But compared to the Endless Ancestor Method created by Ye Tianfu in the future, the Space-Time Ancestor Method of the Time-Space Ancestor was average.

Moreover, Ye Tian's foundation was far from being comparable to the Ancestor of Time and Space.

After three realm years, Ye Tian was extremely excited.

At this moment, he had already created a Golden Ancestor Method, although it was based on a Golden Ancestor Method he created, but other people were also able to comprehend and cultivate.

If this golden ancestor method is shattered piece by piece, it can even give birth to a half-step ancestor in the human race.

Of course, a half-step ancestor is useless to the human race, and if you want to achieve it, you will become an ancestor.

However, just one Golden Ancestor Method could only make a Peerless Peak Domain Ancestor or Soul Ancestor become an Ancestor.

Next, every few realm years, Ye Tian would be able to create an Ancestor Method.

The Ancestor of Wood, the Ancestor of Water, the Ancestor of Fire, the Ancestor of Earth, the Ancestor of Light, and the Ancestor of Darkness......

A sect ancestor method was created by Ye Tian, if the other ancestors knew, they would definitely be stunned and feel unbelievable.

Even if they destroyed the Ancestor and the Holy Ancestor, such a top Ancestor, and let them create other Ancestor Methods, they would not be able to create them.

The Ancestor of Destruction is walking the path of destroying the Ancestor, and the Ancestor Law he created is the Ancestor Law of Destruction, but if he is asked to go to the Ancestor Law of the Creation Gold, he is confused, so he doesn't understand it at all.

That is, Ye Tian walked the Endless Path, so he was able to create many ancestral methods.

In addition, the Ancestor of Destruction has already created a method of destroying the Ancestors, and there is no way to continue to create a second method of destroying the Ancestors, if he tries to create it, he will go back to the same path of the Ancestor Law in the dark.

It was precisely because of this that the Ancestor of Destruction could not help other Superior Domain Ancestors to achieve the Ancestor.

Other people who want to become the Ancestor can only rely on themselves, and they can't rely on the Ancestor.

Otherwise, it would not be possible for many Holy Gates to have one or two ancestors.

And Ye Tian is too demonic, and now he has created so many ancestors, which is enough for the human race to give birth to a famous ancestor.

"Only the Space Ancestor Law and the Time Ancestor Law are left!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Although he had a spatial ancestor method, it was someone else's spatial ancestor method.

In order to create his own spatial ancestor method, not being affected by the Aoba Ancestor Clone's Space Ancestor Method, Ye Tian's body directly blocked the connection with the doppelganger Aoba Ancestor, and erased the memory of the spatial ancestor method in his mind, so as to start creating.

Otherwise, once it is affected, the creation of the Space Ancestor Law will not be able to succeed.
